title: Villager Pickup++
description: Allows you to pick up villagers and place them somewhere else.
body:
# Villager Pickup++

Tired of constantly having to move villagers with minecarts or boats? It's understandable - their pathfinding is horrible, it's as if they go away from you on purpose! Well boy do I have the solution for you! With Villager Pickup++ you can simply **shift right-click** and pick up the villager :D

Pick up villagers and place them elsewhere while preserving all their data, including enchantments!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/viGFe-d_SZA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features

- Preserves all villager data including enchantments
- Detailed tooltips
- Can't place on spawners or other villagers

## Commands

`/villager-pickup-plus-plus`

## Installation

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - server-side only.

## Known Issue

- ~~Villager biome does not save. (Will always be plains when placed down)~~ **fixed in 1.21.9 update** :D
- Villagers not keeping their discounts.
- Villagers not re-linking with their workstations.
## Support

Join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/wRBJJyFTXS) - **ping @suna7306 for updates**.
